headlines.title: US-Iran Peace Talks in Doubt After Second Clash in 3 Days
headlines.description: The United States and Iran once again exchanged fire, sending oil prices rising and casting new doubt on peace talks. Iranian media report that Iran's forces first fired warning shots as American ships tried to pass through the Strait of Hormuz without authorization and that the U.S. military responded with strikes. An American official described the strikes as self-defense. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: New Video Shows Devastation After Chemical Plant Implosion
headlines.description: New video captures the devastation inside the Nippon Paper Industries plant in Washington, moments after the implosion of a massive chemical tank. Authorities say two people were killed and at least nine are still missing. The cause of the disaster is still unknown. NBC’s Morgan Chesky reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Republicans brace for money problems in Texas after Ken Paxton’s win
headlines.description: Ken Paxton has trailed Democratic state Rep. James Talarico in fundraising. Some Republicans say the party will have to spend millions to win the Senate race.

headlines.title: Trump racks up May primary wins in Republican retribution campaign
headlines.description: President Donald Trump went on a winning streak in May primaries as he ousted several Republicans who had dissented from his party line, further tightening his grip on the GOP.

headlines.title: U.S. dismisses claim its diplomats have fled Kyiv as Zelenskyy pens Trump letter
headlines.description: The United States on Thursday reiterated that its diplomats remained in Kyiv despite Russia’s escalating threats, dismissing a suggestion from the European Union’s top diplomat that Washington had evacuated the Ukrainian capital

headlines.title: When drug after drug failed, a teen hoped brain surgery could fix her daily seizures. Insurance denied it.
headlines.description: Several weeks after NBC News reached out to Anthem Blue Cross Blue Shield about the denial, the insurer changed its policy to include coverage of deep brain stimulation for certain children.

headlines.title: Google engineer made $1.2M placing bets on Polymarket using confidential info, prosecutors say
headlines.description: A Google software engineer was accused Wednesday of using confidential company information to make over $1.2 million on Polymarket in the second significant criminal case tied to trades on the prediction market platform.

headlines.title: Shakira invites Ugandan dance troupe 'Ghetto Kids' to perform at the World Cup halftime show
headlines.description: Superstar Shakira invited a kids dancing group from Uganda to perform with her at the World Cup after seeing viral videos of their performance. The "Ghetto Kids" are part of a wider foundation that helps disadvantaged children in Uganda through music, dance, and drama. NBC News' Raf Sanchez talk to the kids about this opportunity.

headlines.title: Today: Laura Jarrett answers your questions about the Supreme Court and more
headlines.description: Today is a decision day at the Supreme Court, which has yet to issue rulings on consequential cases like Trump v. Barbara on birthright citizenship or Trump v. Lisa Cook, the Federal Reserve official.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Houston planning out-of-this-world experience for World Cup fans this summer
headlines.description: Soccer fans headed to Houston for the World Cup this summer can expect an out-of-this-world experience as the city combines its connection to the stars while roping in some of the best of what the city has to offer by keeping two feet on the ground.

headlines.title: CVS Caremark will cover Lilly’s weight loss drug Zepbound again after patient backlash
headlines.description: CVS Caremark will resume covering the weight loss drug Zepbound this year after it removed it from its list of covered medications last year, drugmaker Eli Lilly said.
